title: iberis ciliata
intro: Iberis ciliata, also known as Candytuft, is a flowering plant species native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its delicate white or pink flowers and feathery foliage. The medicinal properties of Iberis ciliata include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of Candytuft include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce fever, and promote wound healing, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments. Iberis ciliata is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and can also be used topically to treat skin irritations and wounds.
